home.lede: Discovery & verification controller na Vortex hatiwo ƒe kadodo.
home.fingerprintDesc: Pin dutoƒo safui sia ɖe wò Vortex asisi me. Wodea asi ŋuɖoɖo ɖesiaɖe si tso dziɖula gbɔ te kplii — masɔmasɔ fia be ame aɖe le asitɔtrɔ wɔm.
home.step1: De Vortex ɖe wò mɔ̃a dzi.
home.step2: Tia Global network ƒe nɔnɔme le ɖoɖowɔɖi ƒe aɖaŋuwɔla me.
home.step3: Kpe dziɖula ƒe URL (si wokpɔa egbɔ le ɖokuiwò si to SNS dzi) alo URL si nèŋlɔ tso nyatakakadzraɖoƒe sia.
home.step4: Kpɔ egbɔ be pubkey si le wò dɔwɔnua me sɔ kple asibidɛ si le etame.
home.step5: Mie do ƒome kplikplikpli. Wokpɔa nu bubu ɖesiaɖe (node ​​list, signatures) gbɔ le wo ɖokui si.
home.nodesDesc: Hati siwo katã woŋlɔ ŋkɔ na, ​​woƒe kpekpeme, nuwuƒe, kple kpeɖodzitsoƒewo.
home.entriesDesc: Bootstrap URLwo na asisi siwo va zi gbãtɔ — Cloudflare mɔ̃wo, Tor, IPFS, tẽ.
home.mirrorsDesc: Amedzroxɔla bubu siwo subɔa nyatakaka sia ke si wode asi na ne woɖe mɔ ɖe eŋu.
home.securityDesc: Nusiwo ŋu wotsɔ nya ɣaɣlawo ɖo kpee, nusiwo womeɖo kpe edzi o, kple nusitae ƒe mama blibo.
home.totalReg: ƒe xexlẽme bliboa si woŋlɔ ŋkɔ na

nodes.title: Node siwo woŋlɔ ŋkɔ na
nodes.lede: Hati ɖesiaɖe si dziɖula la nya nu tsoe. Asitsalawo xlẽa xexlẽdzesi sia, ɖoa kpe asidede agbalẽ te dzi, eye wotiaa node aɖe si woatsɔ aƒo ka na wo le kpekpeme nu. Node yeye si wotu nu ɖo la ƒe kpekpeme xɔa 1.0; node xoxowo alo esiwo wometre o la gblẽna ɖoa ta 0 eyata ʋuwo sina yia agbe, hati siwo dzi woka ɖo ɖeɖeko.
nodes.legendDualD: Woŋlɔ ŋkɔ ɖe dziɖula gbɔ EYE wotre enu ɖe ​​kɔsɔkɔsɔ dzi to Solana dzi. Ðasefo eve siwo le wo ɖokui si ɖo kpe code hash la dzi.
nodes.legendCtrlD: Woŋlɔ ŋkɔ ɖe HTTP ƒe dziɖula gbɔ. Asidede agbalẽ te ɖo kpe edzi be node la tɔe nye eƒe safui ɣaɣla, gake code ƒe blibonyenye meɖo seke ɖe kɔsɔkɔsɔ dzi o.
nodes.legendUnverifT: Bootstrap si ŋu womeɖo kpee o
nodes.legendUnverifD: Wonyae tso config file alo nyakpakpa me. Womeɖo kpe edzi haɖe o. Wɔ nu ɖe ​​eŋu nyuie — ame sia ame ate ŋu ado boblo pubkey vaseɖe esime kpeɖodzi nava.

entries.title: URL siwo dzi woŋlɔa nyawo ɖo
entries.lede: Gɔmedzedze na asisi si si hati aɖeke mele haɖe o. URL ɖesiaɖe si woŋlɔ ɖe eme nye mɔ si dzi woato aɖo dziɖula gbɔ — to Cloudflare mɔ̃, Tor, IPFS agbo, alo domenyinyi tẽ dzi. Kɔpi ɖesiaɖe ɖe wò Vortex dɔwɔnua me ne èdze egɔme zi gbãtɔ.
entries.typeTunnelD: *.trycloudflare.com ƒe adrɛs femaxee. Akɔntabubu aɖeke mehiã o. URL trɔna ne mɔ̃a gadze egɔme ake — bu eŋu abe ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe ƒe nu ene.
entries.typeTorD: .sabala adrɛs, si gbɔ woate ŋu aɖo to Tor dzi ko. Censor-proof, blewu wu. Hiã Tor asisi alo tɔdzisasrã.
entries.typeIpfsD: Static frontend ƒe kɔpi si ƒe adrɛs le emenyawo. Wosubɔe tso IPFS agbo ɖesiaɖe dzi — dɔdzikpɔla ɖeka aɖeke meli si woaxe mɔ na o.
entries.typeDirectD: Domenyinyi si wozãna edziedzi + TLS. Kabakaba wu gake woate ŋu axe mɔ ɖe enu le DNS/IP ƒe ɖoɖo nu.

mirrors.title: Ahuhɔ̃ewo ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo
mirrors.lede: Teƒe bubu siwo subɔa nyatakaka siwo wode asi ete pɛpɛpɛ abe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe sia ene. Viɖe le eŋu ne woxe mɔ ɖe vortexx.sol nu le wò DNS/ISP. Woléa ŋku ɖe ahuhɔ̃e ɖesiaɖe ŋu ɣeaɖewoɣi — dometsotso si le amadede me la ɖea numekuku mamlɛtɔ ƒe emetsonu fiana.
mirrors.healthyD: Wowɔ numekuku le miniti 5 mamlɛawo me eye wòɖo eŋu be OK. Dedie be woazãe fifia. Woɖea latency fiana le agbalẽvi la dzi.
mirrors.unreachableT: Nusi gbɔ womate ŋu aɖo o
mirrors.unreachableD: Probe mamlɛtɔ do kpo nu — kadodo gbe, ɣeyiɣi ƒe nuwuwu, 5xx. Ahuhɔ̃ea ate ŋu aɖiɖi, axe mɔ, alo agba si gbɔ eme. Te esi kplɔe ɖo la kpɔ.
mirrors.noprobeD: Tor .sabala mirrors womate ŋu ado lãmesẽ kpɔ ne menye nutoa me Tor teƒenɔla o. Womenya nɔnɔme o — zã Tor ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe tsɔ doe kpɔ.

security.title: Dedienɔnɔ ƒe kpɔɖeŋu
security.lede: Nusiwo tututu woɖo kpe edzi to nya ɣaɣlawo me, nusiwo womeɖo kpe edzi o, kple alesi safui ɖesiaɖe si le ɖoɖoa me xɔa — alo bu — wò kakaɖedzi. Xlẽ esia hafi nàtsɔ asisi yeyewo aƒo ƒu ɖe dziɖunu si wò ŋutɔ mèwɔna o la ŋu.
security.treasurySub: Solana gakotoku si xɔa protocol fewo (ŋlɔ fewo tso node yeyewo gbɔ + premium subscriptions dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ 20%) eye wòmaa susɔea abe teƒeɖoɖo ene na dɔwɔla siwo le dɔ dzi. Ame sia ame ate ŋu awɔ akɔnta le nusiwo va/siwo dona le eme ŋu le kɔsɔkɔsɔ dzi.
security.treasury1: Kɔsɔkɔsɔ dzi nukpɔkpɔ le gaglãgbe — adrɛs si le etame la nye §vortexx.sol§ tɔ le Solana Ŋkɔ Dɔwɔƒe. Nusianu si va (ƒe ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ ƒe fewo, nudɔdɔwo) kple fetu ɖesiaɖe si woaxe nye Solana ƒe asitsatsa si wode asi — si ŋu amesiame ate ŋu aɖo kpee, wò hã le eme.
security.treasury2: Fe mamã — 70% le premium nudɔdɔ ɖesiaɖe me yia teƒeɖoɖowo ƒe ƒuƒoƒoa (woma pro-rata na nodes to zazã + stake), 20% ga core ŋgɔyiyi, 10% wotɔ dzo / lé abe nugblẽfexeɖoɖo ene. Ŋlɔ fewo anchor node dzeside kple anti-sybil.
security.treasury3: Custody caveat — vaseɖe esime woatsɔ fexexe ƒe smart contract la ade dɔwɔwɔ me la, gaxɔdzikpɔla wɔa dɔ abe ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe ƒe nudzrala ene. Woŋlɔ esia ɖi anukwaretɔe le afisia eye wokplɔe ɖo le dutoƒo. Nubabla si me nunya le la axɔ ɖe asidzikpɔkpɔ teƒe ne audit + on-chain governance nya ɖo anyigba ko.
security.wrongTitle: 6. Ne nane dze abe ɖe wògblẽ ene
